'''''Twilight''''' was the code name for a secret large-scale [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] operation.

==History==
[[Ferus Olin]] uncovered evidence of it in [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]] after hacking [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] Imperial [[Code cylinder/Legends|code cylinder]]. One stage of the operation was a top-secret project to use a memory-wiping drug on people. The project was headed by [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]. She required a test subject who had undivided loyalty to the Empire. Senator [[Sano Sauro]] ordered Imperial Academy headmaster [[Maggis]] to find such a cadet. Though Maggis thought of [[Kestrel]], [[Bog Divinian]] chose his son [[Lune Oddo Divinian|Lune]] for the project.

[[Ry-Gaul]] and [[Trever Flume]] stopped this part of project by destroying the datapad holding information on the formula, while Zan Arbor was injected with the serum, causing her to lose fifty years of her memory and scientific experience. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] rage at her failure caused him to personally kill her.

Vader personally wanted use of the serum to erase the memories of [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|his wife]].

However, the main purpose of this operation was to eliminate all leaders of the resistance against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], in one blow. With the help of [[Eve Yarrow]], all major resistance leaders were ferried to [[Ferus Olin]]'s [[Jedi asteroid|secret asteroid base]]. Vader then went to the base with the help of [[Toma (resistance leader)|Toma's]] [[Homing beacon/Legends|homing device]] and destroyed the asteroid with a superweapon mounted on [[Unidentified Star Destroyer (Twilight)|his]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], a prototype for the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] superlaser. However, the project failed to kill all of the targets, which helped pave the way for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].
